FlowCore Guide: General iLabs Functions 

Scheduling 

Making an Appointment from Scratch 

Go to “Schedule Equipment” Tab 

Graphical user interface, text

Description automatically generated with medium confidence 

Go to “View Schedule” for the desired instrument 

 

Double-click on the desired time on the calendar to open up a new appointment  

Select the correct user for the appointment 

Graphical user interface, text, application

Description automatically generated 

Note: Sometimes you will also have to select the lab to be charged  

Fill out Form 

Scheduled Time 

Pricing Details 

Payment Method *Most Important*  

UMB users will more than likely use a Project ID 

External users typically pay by Credit Card 

“Save Reservation” 

Adjusting and Finalizing Aria II billing 

Adjust Time 

Make sure to adjust the “Logged” time block 

A picture containing text

Description automatically generated 

Make sure to click “Save” to save the change in time 

Add Setup Fee 

Click “Add additional service charge” 

Graphical user interface, application

Description automatically generated 

Adjust value to “1” under “Set Up for ARIA 2” and click the + $50.00  

Graphical user interface, application

Description automatically generated 

Verify fee was added 

 

Save Reservation 

Marking a User as “Trained” 

Go to “People” tab 

 

Search for the user 

Graphical user interface, application, Word

Description automatically generated 

Click the equipment permission (microscope) button 

 

Switch to “Trained” view and check the equipment that the user is now trained on 

A picture containing timeline

Description automatically generated 

Charging Users for Antibodies 

Via Unique Request 

Click on “Request Services” Tab 

A picture containing diagram

Description automatically generated 

Find “Antibodies” section on Service List and Click “Initiate Request” 

A picture containing shape

Description automatically generated 

Select correct customer and lab and click “Proceed” 

Graphical user interface, text, application, email

Description automatically generated 

Add in value of antibody charge and label what charge is for 

Graphical user interface, application

Description automatically generated 

Change “Billing Status” to “Ready to Bill” and “Work Status” to “Completed” 

Graphical user interface, text, application

Description automatically generated 

Click “Submit Request to Researcher” 

A picture containing graphical user interface

Description automatically generated 

Via Adding on to User Booking 

Same as adding on Set Up charge for Aria II but select “Antibodies” instead and add appropriate value 

Make note in notes section that extra charge is for antibodies
